recap: Added batsLintRule_noShebang rule that flags #! on line 1 of .bats files, with tests and wired into bats-lint-custom.

Stripped #!/usr/bin/env bats from all 32 .bats files, removed execute bit from 12, deleted stale shebang test from rule-no-top-level-var.bats, fixed leading blank lines and currentScriptVar violations in touched files.
